meaning: n.鍑虹幇,闇查潰,澶栬矊,澶栬
examples: Don't be fooled by his appearance.
She sets great store by her appearance.
He worries obsessively about his appearance.
Two years later he made his first West End appearance in Gilt And Gingerbread.
From his appearance, I expected him to play something by Megadeth or Black Sabbath.
